styleSuffix: Authentic Turkish construction site documentary photo for SMF Hafriyat Denizli. Same visual series: Aegean dry climate, limestone-beige dusty soil typical of Denizli, Honaz industrial plain horizon, late afternoon warm natural light, consistent warm earth-tone color grade, slight airborne dust, 35mm photojournalism lens, sharp focus on machinery, realistic imperfect saha details. Yellow excavators and orange-white Turkish damper trucks (BMC/Mercedes style), Turkish workers in orange safety vests and white helmets, red-white traffic cones, blurred Turkish plates and signage. NOT stock photography, NOT staged corporate shoot, NOT American/European suburb, NOT oversaturated HDR, NOT lush green lawns, NO text, NO logos, NO watermarks, NO AI artifacts

images.prompt: Master reference shot: wide aerial-ish angle of active hafriyat sahası in Denizli OSB area, yellow 20-ton excavator digging foundation trench in beige limestone soil, two orange damper trucks waiting, dry Aegean sky, authentic Turkish construction operation

Same SMF saha style: excavator opening kanalizasyon trench on Denizli district street, PVC pipes stacked beside trench, asphalt edge, municipal altyapı work
